short_summary: War ongoing; Iran deal may shift US focus
rationale: Active war remains the overwhelming reality for Ukrainians; the unresolved US-Iran deal continues to divide American diplomatic attention away from Ukraine.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues (active combat)
top_events.summary: War persists at maximum intensity for Ukrainian civilians — ongoing strikes, mobilization, and infrastructure risk remain the central daily reality.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: Continued US focus on Iran negotiations keeps American diplomatic and military attention divided, potentially delaying or reducing Western support for Ukraine.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: US domestic AI policy has negligible direct impact on Ukrainian wartime conditions; distant background noise.
